description: Ghar ki sabse pyaari sukhi sabzi — bachpan se sab ne khaayi hai.

steps.instruction: Kadhai mein tel garam karein, jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar golden hone tak bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar daal kar pakayein.
Haldi, mirch, dhaniya powder, namak daalein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Aloo aur gobhi daal kar masale mein mix karein.
Dhakkan laga kar dheemi aanch par 15 minute pakayein.
Hari dhaniya se garnish karke serve karein.

description: Crispy bhindi jo roti ke saath ekdum perfect lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Bhindi ko dho kar achhe se sukha lein chopping se pehle, warna chipchipi hogi. Fir chop karein.
Kadhai mein tel garam karein aur jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar light brown karein.
Bhindi daal kar high flame par 5 minute bhunein.
Haldi, mirch, dhaniya powder, namak daalein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Dheemi aanch par bina dhakkan ke 10 minute pakayein.
Amchur daal kar mix karke serve karein.

description: Jaldi banne wali sabzi — jeera ka tadka aur aloo ka swad, bas itna kaafi hai.

steps.instruction: Kadhai mein tel garam karein, jeera daal kar chatkayein.
Hari mirch daal kar 30 second bhunein.
Boiled aloo daal kar mix karein.
Haldi, mirch, namak daal kar achhi tarah mix karein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
5 minute dheemi aanch par bhunein.
Amchur aur dhaniya daal kar serve karein.

description: Sardi mein gobhi aur matar ka swad lajawab lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar golden karein.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar puree daalein.
Saare masale aur namak daal kar bhunein.
Gobhi aur matar daal kar mix karein.
Dhakkan laga kar 15 minute dheemi aanch par pakayein.
Garam masala daal kar serve karein.

description: Halki phulki sabzi jo pet ke liye bahut achhi hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak daal kar bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Lauki ke cubes daal kar mix karein.
Dhakkan laga kar 15 minute pakayein, lauki khud paani chhodti hai.
Dhaniya garnish karke serve karein.

description: Thoda kadwa lekin sehat ka khazana — sugar ke liye bahut achha hai.

steps.instruction: Karele ko namak laga kar 30 minute rakhein aur dho lein, kadwapan kam ho jaata hai.
Tel garam karke saunf tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar brown karein.
Karela aur masale daalein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Dheemi aanch par 20 minute pakayein.
Amchur daal kar serve karein.

description: Simple aur halki sabzi jo roti ke saath bahut achhi lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun paste bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Tinda daal kar mix karein.
Dhakkan laga kar 20 minute pakayein.
Dhaniya garnish karke serve karein.

description: Methi ki khushboo aur aloo ka swad — winter ki favourite sabzi.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur lehsun tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar golden karein.
Aloo daal kar 5 minute bhunein.
Methi, haldi, mirch, namak daalein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Dhakkan laga kar 12 minute pakayein.
Mix karke serve karein.

description: Smoky baingan ka swad jo dil khush kar de — roti ke saath maza aata hai.

steps.instruction: Baingan ko gas flame par roast karein jab tak chilka kala ho jaye.
Chilka utaar kar baingan ko mash karein.
Tel mein pyaaz, hari mirch, adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Mashed baingan daal kar mix karein.
8 minute aur pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Sardi ki meethi gajar aur taaza matar ka pyaara combo.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz daal kar bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daalein.
1 chammach paani spray karein masala jalne se bachane ke liye.
Gajar aur matar daal kar mix karein.
Dhakkan laga kar 15 minute pakayein.
Garnish karke serve karein.

description: Restaurant-style creamy paneer jo har koi pasand karta hai.

steps.instruction: Butter garam karke pyaaz paste bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun paste daal kar bhunein.
Tamatar puree aur cashew paste daalein.
Masale aur namak daal kar 5 minute pakayein.
Paneer cubes aur cream daal kar mix karein.
Kasuri methi crush karke daalein.
5 minute dheemi aanch par pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Gravy wali sabzi jo poori aur roti dono ke saath kamaal lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke pyaaz paste bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daalein.
Saare masale aur namak daal kar pakayein.
Aloo aur matar daal kar mix karein.
Paani daal kar dhakkan laga kar 18 minute pakayein.
Garam masala daal kar serve karein.

description: Punjabi style chole jo bhature ya chawal ke saath bahut achhe lagte hain.

steps.instruction: Chane ko raat bhar (8 ghante) bhigayein, fir cooker mein 4-5 seeti tak boil karein.
Tel mein tej patta aur pyaaz brown karein.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daal kar pakayein.
Saare masale daal kar bhunein.
Boiled chane aur paani daalein.
10 minute dheemi aanch par pakayein.
Hari dhaniya garnish karke serve karein.

description: Sunday ka favourite — rajma chawal se badhkar kuch nahi.

steps.instruction: Rajma ko raat bhar (8 ghante) bhigayein, fir cooker mein 6 seeti tak boil karein.
Tel garam karke tej patta aur pyaaz bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daalein.
Saare masale daal kar bhunein.
Boiled rajma aur paani daalein.
15 minute dheemi aanch par pakayein.
Garam masala daal kar serve karein.

description: Tangy aur masaledar paneer jo kadhai mein magic create karta hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke pyaaz aur shimla mirch saute karein.
Nikaal kar side rakhein.
Usi tel mein adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree pakayein.
Saare masale daal kar bhunein.
Paneer, pyaaz, shimla mirch daal kar mix karein.
5 minute pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Iron-rich palak aur soft paneer ka healthy combo jo sab ko bhata hai.

steps.instruction: Palak ko boil karke thande paani mein daalein, rang bachega.
Palak aur hari mirch ka puree banayein.
Tel mein pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar daal kar pakayein.
Palak puree, namak, garam masala daalein.
Paneer aur cream daal kar 5 minute pakayein.

description: Soft koftas creamy gravy mein — special occasion ke liye perfect dish.

steps.instruction: Paneer, aloo, maida mix karke koftas banayein.
Tel garam karke koftas golden fry karein.
Alag pan mein pyaaz paste bhunein.
Tamatar puree aur cashew paste daalein.
Masale, namak, cream daal kar mix karein.
Koftas serve karne se pehle gravy mein daalein, warna soft ho jayenge.

description: Earthy mushrooms rich masala ke saath — kuch alag try karna ho toh ye banayein.

steps.instruction: Tel mein pyaaz bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daalein.
Saare masale daal kar pakayein.
Mushroom daal kar 10 minute pakayein, paani khud chhodte hain.
Garam masala daal kar serve karein.

description: Ghee aur jeera ka tadka jo har ghar ki khushboo banata hai.

steps.instruction: Dal ko dho kar cooker mein haldi-namak-paani ke saath 3 seeti boil karein.
Ghee garam karke jeera tadka dein.
Lehsun, hari mirch, pyaaz bhunein.
Tamatar aur lal mirch daal kar pakayein.
Boiled dal mein tadka daalein.
2 minute pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Slow-cooked creamy dal — restaurant wala swad ghar par.

steps.instruction: Soaked dal aur rajma ko 6 seeti tak boil karein.
Butter garam karke pyaaz bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daal kar pakayein.
Saare masale daal kar bhunein.
Boiled dal aur paani daal kar mix karein.
Dheemi aanch par 20 minute pakayein.
Cream daal kar 3 minute aur pakayein.

description: Halki aur sulabh dal jab pet ko aaram chahiye ho.

steps.instruction: Dal ko dho kar cooker mein haldi-namak ke saath 2 seeti boil karein.
Ghee garam karke jeera aur hing tadka dein.
Adrak aur hari mirch daalein.
Tamatar daal kar pakayein.
Tadka dal mein daal kar 3 minute pakayein.

description: Protein-packed dal jo lauki ya aloo ke saath kamaal lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Chana dal ko 30 min bhigayein, fir cooker mein 4 seeti tak boil karein.
Ghee mein jeera aur tej patta tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Boiled dal daal kar 5 minute pakayein.

description: Roz ki simple dal jo chawal ke saath ghar ka swad deti hai.

steps.instruction: Dal cooker mein haldi-namak ke saath 3 seeti boil karein.
Ghee mein jeera aur hing tadka dein.
Adrak, hari mirch, tamatar bhunein.
Tadka dal mein daalein.
2 minute pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Dhaba style dal jo har bite mein swad bhar deti hai.

steps.instruction: Dono dals ko mix karke 3 seeti boil karein.
Ghee mein jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Boiled dal daal kar mix karein.
Garam masala daal kar 3 minute pakayein.

description: Paanch dals ka mela — protein ka khazana ek hi katori mein.

steps.instruction: Saari dals mix karke 4 seeti boil karein.
Ghee mein jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Tadka dal mein daalein.
5 minute pakayein aur serve karein.

description: Heavy aur taakatwar dal — sardiyon mein ekdum perfect.

steps.instruction: Urad dal ko soak karke 4 seeti boil karein.
Ghee mein jeera tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Tadka dal mein daal kar 5 minute pakayein.

description: Soft phulki rotis jo har thali ki jaan hain.

steps.instruction: Atta mein namak aur paani daal kar soft dough banayein.
Dough ko 10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Chote pede banayein aur belan se belein.
Tawa garam karke roti dono side sekein.
Direct flame par phulayein.
Ghee laga kar serve karein.

description: Sardi ki subah ka king — makhan ke saath aap ko bahut pasand aayega.

steps.instruction: Atta gunth lein aur 10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Aloo mein pyaaz, mirch, masale, dhaniya mix karein.
Dough ka pera banayein, aloo bharein, band karein.
Belan se paratha belein.
Tawa par dono side ghee lagakar sekein.
Dahi ya achaar ke saath serve karein.

description: Healthy methi se bhara paratha — sardi mein roz banayein.

steps.instruction: Atta mein methi, masale, ajwain, namak mix karein.
Paani daal kar soft dough banayein.
10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Chote pede banakar belein.
Tawa par ghee lagakar dono side sekein.

description: Crispy layered paratha jo dal makhani ke saath swarg lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Maida, atta, namak, doodh aur paani se soft dough banayein.
10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Pera belein, ghee lagayein, pleats banayein.
Pleats ko roll karke dobara belein.
Tawa par ghee lagakar crispy sekein.
Crush karke serve karein.

description: Phule-phule bhature jo chole ke saath ekdum dilkash lagte hain.

steps.instruction: Saari dry ingredients mix karein.
Dahi aur paani daal kar soft dough banayein.
2 ghante warm jagah par rest dein.
Pede banakar belein.
Garam tel mein golden fry karein.
Chole ke saath serve karein.

description: Besan aur atta ka rustic combo jo dahi ke saath maza dega.

steps.instruction: Atta, besan, masale, pyaaz, mirch mix karein.
Paani daal kar dough banayein.
10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Pede banakar belein.
Tawa par ghee lagakar dono side sekein.

description: Fluffy jeera rice jo dal ke saath swarg lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Chawal ko 2-3 baar achhe se dho lein, fir 20 minute soak karein.
Ghee mein jeera, tej patta, laung tadka dein.
Chawal aur namak daal kar 1 minute bhunein.
Paani daal kar boil aane dein.
Dhakkan laga kar dheemi aanch par 15 minute pakayein.

description: Sabziyon se bhara aromatic pulao jo raita ke saath mast lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Chawal ko 2-3 baar achhe se dho lein, fir 20 minute soak karein.
Ghee mein whole spices tadka dein.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhunein.
Sabzi aur garam masala daal kar bhunein.
Chawal, paani, namak daalein.
Dhakkan laga kar 15 minute pakayein.

description: Layered biryani jo har bite mein magic lekar aati hai — Sunday special.

steps.instruction: Chawal ko 2-3 baar achhe se dho lein aur 20 min soak karein.
Chicken ko dahi, adrak-lehsun aur masale mein 30 min marinate karein.
Pyaaz ko tel mein crispy brown karein (birista).
Chawal ko 70% boil karein aur strain karein.
Marinated chicken ko 15 min pakayein.
Chicken par chawal, birista, pudina, saffron layer karein.
Dum par dheemi aanch par 20 minute pakayein.
Halke se mix karke raita ke saath serve karein.

description: Pet ki dawai — jab kuch bhaari na khaana ho toh khichdi se behtar kuch nahi.

steps.instruction: Chawal aur dal ko 2-3 baar achhe se dho lein.
Cooker mein ghee garam karke jeera-hing tadka dein.
Dal, chawal, haldi, namak, paani daalein.
4 seeti tak pakayein.
Ghee daal kar serve karein.

description: Garmiyon ka coolant — pet ko thanda rakhne wala simple meal.

steps.instruction: Boiled chawal ko thoda mash karein.
Dahi, doodh, namak mix karein.
Tel mein rai, hari mirch, curry patta tadka dein.
Tadka chawal mein daal kar mix karein.
Achaar ke saath serve karein.

description: Sunday breakfast ka raja — poori ke saath aloo masala swarg jaisa lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Atta gunth lein aur 10 min rest dein, soft roti ke liye zaroori.
Tel mein jeera tadka karke tamatar pakayein.
Masale aur boiled aloo daalein, paani daal kar 8 min pakayein.
Atta ke pede banakar belein.
Garam tel mein poori fula kar fry karein.

description: 10 minute mein ready — Indore style poha sabse achha lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Poha ko dho kar 2 min rakhein.
Tel mein rai, curry patta, hari mirch tadka dein.
Aloo daal kar 5 min pakayein.
Pyaaz daal kar bhunein.
Poha, haldi, namak daal kar mix karein.
Nimbu daal kar serve karein.

description: Sooji ka soft halwa-jaisa nashta — jaldi banta aur pet bharta.

steps.instruction: Sooji ko bina tel ke 4 min bhunein.
Alag pan mein ghee mein rai, curry patta tadka dein.
Pyaaz, mirch, sabzi daal kar bhunein.
Paani aur namak daal kar boil karein.
Sooji daal kar lagatar mix karein, gaanth na bane.
Dhakkan laga kar 3 min steam karein.

description: Spicy scrambled eggs jo pav ya roti ke saath kamaal lagte hain.

steps.instruction: Tel mein pyaaz aur hari mirch bhunein.
Adrak-lehsun paste daal kar pakayein.
Tamatar aur masale daal kar pakayein.
Ande phod kar daalein aur lagatar mix karein.
Garam masala aur dhaniya daal kar serve karein.

description: Healthy aur protein-rich pancakes — chai ke saath perfect.

steps.instruction: Besan mein paani daal kar smooth batter banayein.
Saari sabzi, masale, namak mix karein.
Tawa garam karke tel lagayein.
Batter pour karke phaila dein.
Dono side 3-3 min sekein.
Chutney ke saath serve karein.

description: Chai ke saath crispy bread pakora — barish ka mood set kar deta hai.

steps.instruction: Aloo mein mirch aur masale mix karein.
Bread par aloo masala bharein aur 2 slice se cover karein.
Besan mein paani aur namak mila kar batter banayein.
Bread sandwich ko batter mein dubayein.
Garam tel mein crispy fry karein.
Chutney ke saath serve karein.

description: Garam-garam halwa subah ke nashte ka swarg lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Ghee mein sooji ko golden bhunein.
Alag pan mein doodh, paani, cheeni boil karein.
Boiled liquid sooji mein dhire dhire daalein, chheente bachne ke liye dhyaan rakhein.
Lagatar chalate hue thick karein.
Elaichi aur dry fruits daal kar serve karein.

description: Vrat ka favourite — light, crunchy aur swadisht.

steps.instruction: Sabudana 4 ghante pehle bhigao, paani drain karke side rakho.
Ghee mein jeera, curry patta, hari mirch tadka dein.
Aloo daal kar 6 min pakayein.
Soaked sabudana daal kar mix karein.
Moongphali aur sendha namak daalein.
5 min dheemi aanch par pakayein.
Nimbu daal kar serve karein.

description: Vrat mein khaane wali soft pooris — aloo sabzi ke saath kamaal lagti hain.

steps.instruction: Kuttu atta mein aloo, mirch, namak mix karein.
Paani daal kar firm dough banayein.
Chote pede banakar belein, kuttu atta nazuk hota hai dhyaan rakhein.
Garam tel mein dono side golden fry karein.
Vrat aloo sabzi ke saath serve karein.

description: Vrat mein crispy snack jo chai ke saath bhi jamta hai.

steps.instruction: Singhara atta mein paani, mirch, jeera, namak mila kar batter banayein.
Aloo slices ko batter mein dubayein.
Garam tel mein crispy fry karein.
Tissue par nikalein aur serve karein.

description: Simple aur sattvik aloo sabzi jo vrat mein perfect lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Ghee mein jeera tadka dein.
Adrak aur hari mirch daalein.
Tamatar daal kar pakayein.
Boiled aloo, kali mirch, sendha namak daalein.
Paani daal kar 8 min pakayein.
Mash karke gravy banayein aur serve karein.

description: Sardi ki shaan — laal gajar ka halwa khao aur khush ho jao.

steps.instruction: Kadhai mein doodh aur gajar daal kar pakayein jab tak doodh sukh jaye.
Ghee daal kar 10 min bhunein.
Cheeni daal kar mix karein, paani chhodega.
Khoya aur elaichi daal kar 5 min pakayein.
Dry fruits se garnish karke serve karein.

description: Prasad wala classic halwa jo har shubh kaam mein banta hai.

steps.instruction: Paani aur cheeni boil karke sugar syrup banayein.
Alag pan mein ghee mein sooji golden bhunein.
Garam syrup sooji mein dhire dhire daalein, chheente bachne ke liye dhyaan rakhein.
Lagatar chalate hue thick karein.
Elaichi, kaju, kishmish daal kar mix karein.
Garam serve karein.
